Home.title: The Impact of ESG adoption on Sustainable Financial Performance in your Organization
Home.purposeContent: This study aims to investigate on how Cameroonian Mobile Telecoms can leverage structured ESG adoption to secure long-term financial performance in a growing market.
Home.proceduresContent: If you agree to participate, you are required to complete a questionnaire that follows. This questionnaire will require you to provide the name of your organization, your level in the organization’s hierarchy, your role, and the years of experience you have in ESG related topics. Then you will be required to provide your opinion on how ESG is being practiced by your organization by answering YES/NO question, and providing a few recommendations at the end. You are not required to disclose your personal information in at any time in the survey.
Home.risksContent: You might face retaliation risks from your employer if you provide negative feedback on ESG practices and this comes to their notice.
Home.benefitsContent: You may benefit from this study if your organization implements actions that bring positive social and financial benefits for employees although this cannot be guaranteed. You should also be proud to contribute to the creation of new knowledge on ESG adoption in Cameroon.
Home.confidentialityContent: Your information will be protected and stored securely.
Home.voluntaryContent: Participation is voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time without penalty. You are free to fully disclose, partially disclose or not disclose at all any information you deem to sensitive to be made available to outsiders, without any penalties.
Home.agreementLabel: I have read the ABOVE information and AGREE to participate in this study under the stated conditions.

Survey.title: ESG Telecom Survey
Survey.description: Evaluating Environmental, Social, and Governance practices in the Cameroon telecommunications sector.
Survey.validationError: Please fix the validation errors in the form above before submitting.
Survey.successMessage: Your ESG survey response has been successfully recorded. We appreciate your participation in this research.

toast.submitError: Failed to submit survey. Please check your connection and try again.

A.title: SECTION A — Respondent Information
A.q1: 1. What is your role in the company?
A.q2: 2. Which department do you work in?
A.q3: 3. How many years have you worked in the telecom sector?
A.q4: 4. Which telecom company are you employed by?

B.title: SECTION B — Awareness & Understanding
B.q5: 5. How familiar are you with the term 'ESG' (Environmental, Social, and Governance)?
B.q6: 6. Which of the following best describes your company's level of sustainability practices?
B.q7: 7. Does your company currently publish an annual sustainability or ESG report?

sustainabilityLevels.A mix of CSR and early ESG elements: A mix of CSR and early ESG elements
sustainabilityLevels.A structured ESG strategy with defined K: A structured ESG strategy with defined KPIs
sustainabilityLevels.No formal CSR or ESG practices: No formal CSR or ESG practices

implementationMainQ.environmental: 8. To what extent does your company implement the following environmental practices?
implementationMainQ.social: 9. To what extent does your company implement the following social practices?
implementationMainQ.governance: 10. To what extent does your company implement the following governance practices?

environmental.energyEfficiency: Energy efficiency initiatives (solar sites, low energy equipment)
environmental.dataCentreEnergyManagement: Network or data centre energy management
environmental.environmentalTracking: Tracking environmental performance metrics (e.g., CO₂ emissions)

governance.ethicalConduct: Policies for ethical conduct and anti-corruption
governance.riskManagement: Integration of ESG into risk management

D.title: SECTION D — Value & Impact
D.q11: 11. How important do you believe ESG is for the financial performance of your company?
D.q12: 12. What specific financial benefits do you associate with ESG adoption? (Select all that apply)
D.q13: 13. To what extent do you agree that strong ESG performance leads to long-term profitability?
D.q14: 14. Do you believe there is a measurable link between ESG and financial success?

E.title: SECTION E — Barriers
E.q15: 15. Primary Strategic Challenges (Select all that apply)
E.q16Title: 16. Rate the significance of the following barriers:

barriers.limitedData: Limited quality data to measure performance

F.title: SECTION F — Internal Readiness
F.q17: 17. How prepared is your company internally for mandatory ESG reporting?
F.q18: 18. Does your company have a dedicated ESG or Sustainability team?
F.q19: 19. Which indicators are currently tracked? (Select all that apply)

G.title: SECTION G — Open Ended
G.q20: 20. What recommendations would you give for improving ESG adoption in the Cameroon telecom sector?

Feedback.title: Final Step: Your Feedback
Feedback.description: We value your thoughts on this survey experience.
Feedback.q1: 1. Rate the overall clarity of the questions: very clear, clear, some ambiguity, not clear at all
Feedback.q3: 3. How would you rate your overall experience? (1-5)
Feedback.footer: Your feedback helps us improve our research methodology.
